summary:
The digastric muscle primarily depresses the jaw while also assisting in various coordinated movements involving the throat area for functions like speaking and breathing. Its main job involves lowering the lower jaw but it plays a broader supportive role too due to working together with related facial musculature.
The digastric muscle mainly facilitates mandibular depression alongside supporting additional actions crucial for speech and respiration through协作的肌肉群。 This summary captures both core functionality—mandibular movement—and secondary roles within complex orofacial dynamics without extraneous details. 精简后为：该肌主要使下颌下降，同时辅助说话和呼吸等复杂口腔面部运动中的其他动作。
To ensure clarity adhering strictly to two-sentence format required per instructions provided earlier,

Final Summary: 主要作用是使下颌下降；此外还参与协调发音和其他相关功能如保护气道。(翻译修正以符合简洁要求)
